name: zsnd_fade_active_list_tick_all
description: zSndFadeActiveList::TickAll updates active fades, compacts surviving entries forward, and deletes completed trailing active-list nodes.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for _zSndFadeActiveList_TickAll@4 at 0x4a3c20 still fails: 212 unmasked mismatches, 28 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 241 bytes, VC object symbol size 144 bytes.

Reviewed triage shows broad control-flow/code-size drift in the sentinel loop, compaction, and trailing-node deletion blocks; this remains functional-only until the zSound fade-list cluster receives a binary-safe pass.
